subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who desireth to take a path unto the Lord of the Throne, that the fragrances of remembrance may draw him unto the station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اراد ان یتخذ الی ذی العرش سبیلا لتجذبه نفحات الذکر الی مقام
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
